zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Cave於1661年7月5日出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓時，她的父親John Carter Cave24歲，母親Elizabeth Harriet Travers20歲。她於1683年與John Echols, Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州卡羅琳結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1712年在美國西維吉尼亞州梅沙金享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Cave于1661年7月5日出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓时，她的父亲John Carter Cave24岁，母亲Elizabeth Harriet Travers20岁。她于1683年与John Echols, Jr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州卡羅琳结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1712年在美国西弗吉尼亚州梅沙金享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Cave was born on 5 July 1661, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Carter Cave, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth Harriet Travers, was 20. She married John Echols, Jr. in 1683, in Caroline, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1712, in King, Mercer, West Virginia, United States, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Cave est née le 5 juillet 1661, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Carter Cave, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Harriet Travers, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Echols, Jr. en 1683, à Caroline, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1712, à King, Mercer, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Cave am 5. Juli 1661 in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Carter Cave 24 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Harriet Travers 20. Sie hat 1683 in Caroline, Virginia, British Colonial America John Echols, Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1712 im Alter von 51 Jahren in King, Mercer, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Cave è nata il il 5 luglio 1661 nel Misterton, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Carter Cave, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Harriet Travers, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Echols, Jr. nel 1683, nel Caroline, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1712, nel King, Mercer, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Caveが1661年7月5日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンで生まれた時，父John Carter Caveは24歳，母Elizabeth Harriet Traversは20歳であった。1683年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州カーオラインでJohn Echols, Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1712年にアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州メルサーキングで51歳で死去した。

ko.King and Queen, Virginia, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 킨그 앤드 퀸
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Cave(이)가 1661년 7월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Carter Cave(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Harriet Travers(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1683년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 캐럴라이인에서 John Echols, Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1712년 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 머서 킨그에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Cave nasceu em 5 de julho de 1661, em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Carter Cave, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Harriet Travers, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Echols, Jr. em 1683, em Caroline, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1712, em King, Mercer, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América, com 51 anos.

ru.King, Mercer County, West Virginia, Brit: кинг, мирсир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Cave родилась 5 июля 1661 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Carter Cave было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Harriet Travers, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Echols, Jr. в 1683 г. в местности каролаин, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1712 г. в местности кинг, мирсир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Cave nació el 5 de julio de 1661, en Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Carter Cave, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Harriet Travers, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Echols, Jr. en 1683, en Caroline, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1712, en King, Mercer, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 51 años.
